"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "Identifies key conceptual issues and proposes specific reframing solutions, showing a deep understanding of the underlying concepts.",
  "R1.2": "Walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flags multiple inconsistencies, and proposes detailed repairs.",
  "R1.4": "Names prior works but does not map against multiple nearest works; partially supported delta articulation.",
  "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for several claims and provides alternative explanations with confidence markers.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, addressing all major issues effectively.",
  "RX.4": "Avoids introducing errors and identifies harmful patterns in the original abstract.",
  "RX.5": "Traces major rewrites but does not annotate minor edits."
},

},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies key conceptual issues and proposes specific reframing solutions, showing a deep understanding of the underlying concepts.
rationale.R1.2: Walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flags multiple inconsistencies, and proposes detailed repairs.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior works but does not map against multiple nearest works; partially supported delta articulation.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for several claims and provides alternative explanations with confidence markers.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, addressing all major issues effectively.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing errors and identifies harmful patterns in the original abstract.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but does not annotate minor edits.
